name: Ancient-Blooded Dwarf
text: Ancient-Blooded Dwarf Source Player Core pg. 43 2.0 Dwarven heroes of old could shrug off their enemies' magic, and some of that resistance manifests in you. You gain the Call on Ancient Blood reaction.
markdown:

Dwarven heroes of old could shrug off their enemies' magic, and some of that resistance manifests in you. You gain the Call on Ancient Blood reaction.
